mapper.sql: select id, kb_id, document_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, milvus_id, image_path, image_description, create_time from ai_knowledge_chunk
mapper.select: where document_id = #{documentId} order by chunk_index asc
where kb_id = #{kbId} order by document_id asc, chunk_index asc
mapper.insert: insert into ai_knowledge_chunk (kb_id, document_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, milvus_id, image_path, image_description, create_time) values (#{kbId}, #{documentId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{tokenCount}, #{milvusId}, #{imagePath}, #{imageDescription}, NOW())

insert into ai_knowledge_chunk (kb_id, document_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, milvus_id, image_path, image_description, create_time) values
(#{chunk.kbId}, #{chunk.documentId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.tokenCount}, #{chunk.milvusId}, #{chunk.imagePath}, #{chunk.imageDescription}, NOW())
mapper.select: select count(*) from ai_knowledge_chunk where kb_id = #{kbId}
